1.title: Which series?

11.content: Which girl would you like to tickle?
11.title: Dragon Ball

12.content: Which girl would you like to tickle?
12.title: Dragon Ball Z

choices: Use a tool from the collection
123.content:
You find yourself enclosed in a room. Inside of this room lays Videl bound in an X shape against a big metal table with leather cuffs holding her by the wrists and ankles. Videl is wearing only her underwear and nothing more, leaving much exposed. To the side of the room lays equipment on tables and inside shelves, anything you could dream of to help aid you tickle Videl.

"Hey you! Help me" Videl asks, desperately, "I'm trapped"

However you have other ideas. As you approach Videl she senses that you want to do other things than help her. Videl quickly tugs are her bonds, the metal chains attached to the leather straps rattle and hardly budge, she's stuck.

"Hey! Stay back! I'm warning you!" Videls says, trying to gain some power in her helpless situation. She slumps in her bondage and prepares herself as you approach. Little does she expect what you're going to do.

Taking your hand out, you begin lightly teasing Videls belly with your fingers. She flinches, unexpecting this and what's to come and tries to hold in her giggles. Although you know how pointless that's going to be as she's clearly unbelievably ticklish.

"Hehehehehehehehehe" she finally splutters out, squirming slightly in her bonds trying to escape the tickling. "Hehehehahahahaha, stop whahahat are you dohohohoing"

You remain silent for now, making it that much harder on Videl as she giggles and squirms under your fingers. Picking up the pace you get a nice reaction out of her.

"Gahahahahaha Ohohohoho Nohohoho. Stahahahahahap" "Oh no plehehehease aaaaaahahahahahahaha" "Wahahahahahaha" she laughs, now starting to properly struggle and squirm in her bondage to no avail.

You quickly move from tickling Videls belly to her sides in an instant, unsuspecting of Videl she yelps and begins laugher harder. This clearly tickles more than her belly.

"Ahahahaha Oh No Hahahahahahaha! Wahahahahahaha no get ohohoff! Aaaaaahahahahahahaha, it tickles! Hahahahaha" Videl shrieks to the new sensations along her sides.
"Ohohohohoho Gohohohohod! Ohohohohahahahahaha, no please Hahahahahahaha! Stop Hahahahahahaha"

Already begging for her torture to end, where to go next?
123.title: Videl

1232.content:
You begin to slowly spider tickle your way up Videls sides and ribs, inching ever closer to her bare underarms. Videl realises this and begins to squirm around more, trying in vain to escape her bondage.

"Bwahahahahahaha, Nohohohohoho Stahahahahap" Videl begs as you slowly pass her ribs, her struggle only increasing to try and keep you away from your goal. Just within reach, you stop. Giving Videl a well earned breather, slumping down against the table. You place your fingers on the edge of the leather cuffs keeping her in place and begin to skitter your way down her arms, again going towards her underarms.

"Pffffft" is all that comes out of Videls lips as she tries to seal them shut to hide what we both know to be true. How unbearably ticklish her underarms must truly be. Her arms tremble and shake side to side trying to escape your grasp. Just as her midsection did only a moment ago when you were tormenting her belly.
"Hehehehehehe" Videl finally giggles as you near her underarms. "Hehehehe, no stop, please" asks Videl, knowing what to be coming to be true.

Ignoring her pleads you immediately tickle her bare underarms with no mercy.
"AAAAAAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA, WAIT WAIHAHAHAHAHAHAIT! HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA, NO PLEHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!" Videl shrieks, knowing it was to be but not expecting it to happen so soon. The sensation on her underarms is almost unbearable. Her squirming intensifies ten-fold, pulling her arms down to try to protect them as hard as she can. Kicking and swaying side to side desperate to escape.
"OH GAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAD! NAHAHAHAHAHAT THEHEHEHEHEHERE! AAAAAAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!"
The tickling is immense for Videl, with every nerve ending seemingly on fire sending ticklish signals to her brain. She continues to struggle again and again with limitless energy. All in her vain attempt to escape her unbreakable bonds.
"WAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! OH MY GOHAHAHAHAHAHAHAD! ANYTHIHIHIHIHING BUT THEHEHEHEHEHERE! AAAAAAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!"
"NO WAIHAHAHAHAHAHAHA, WAIT PLEHEHEHEHEHEASE! GAHAHAHAHAHAHA! WHAT DO YOU WAHAHAHAHAHANT!? AHAHAHAHAHAHAHA" Videl begs and laughs, trying to find some way to free herself and some reason why this is happening. Why did she have to be so insanely ticklish on her underarms? And why did you have to find that one spot there that she cannot stand to be tickled. She can't bear it, let alone the night the you have planned for her.

"HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! AHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! STAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAP! WAAAAAAAAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! NO MOHOHOHOHOHORE! AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!" Videl helplessly laughs as you continue her tickling.

Although it's time to spice things up...
1232.title: Underarms

12321.content:
Momentarily stopping, you go look at the different items you can use to make Videls torture even worse. For Videl however this short break is nothing less than a miracle from the 30 minutes of tickling she just had to endure. She slumped down on the table, saving what energy she has left for what's to come.
You return to her with a blindfold, perfectly fit so she won't be able to see a thing. She struggles a bit but eventually you get the blindfold on. There isn't one peep or crack that videl can look through to see what's going to happen to her, and she slowly feels dread come over her as she knows this'll be ten times worse.

"NAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!" She explodes as you tickle her underarms for a couple of seconds. The sweat that is now collecting on her making her slightly more ticklish, reminding you to use lotion to make her that much more ticklish. But that's for later.

Videl is perfectly still, trying to use what little senses she has left to predict just where you'll tickle her next, to no avail. She's even more helpless and powerless than before.

"GAAAAhahahahahahahahaha! No Ahahahahahahahaa! God PLEASE Hahahahahahahahaha!" she laughs as you go back to tickling her sides.
"No please Ahahahahahahahahaha, no more Hahahahahahahahaha! Aaaaahahahahahahaha" Videl squirms side to side to try and helplessly evade your merciless fingers as you tickle her, and it's becoming quite clear to her that escape is not an option. And she's only going to get more desperate as you tickle her underarms.

"WAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA, NO FUHAHAHAHAHAHA FUCK HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! AAAAAAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! PLEASE GRAHAHAHAHAHAHA! I CAHAHAHAHAHANT! NO MOHOHOHOHOHORE! HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!" Videl shrieks, summoning all of her strength to continue thrashing about in her bonds to escape her predicament. More sweat forming with each and every struggle, and each time her position becomes that much more clear to her. That there is no escape and she simply has to beg for her freedom.

"NAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA, OH FUCK HAHAHAHAAHAHAHA! NAHAHAHAHAT THEHEHEHEHERE! HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! PLEHEHEHEHEHEASE NO MOHOHOHOHOHORE! I CAHAHAHAHANT! I'LL DO ANYTHIHIHIHIHIHING! AAAAAAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!". Seemingly starting to break, Videls begging is becoming more desperate and you think its time to increase her torture.
12321.title: Use a blindfold

info.brief_description: You tickle the girls of Dragon Ball
info.description:
Here YOU tickle any of the girls of Dragon Ball. Whether the original, Z, GT or Super the choice is yours.

No kids.

Please add as you feel fit and have fun.
